subject: Two law-enforcement figures subdue a third person with a magical lasso on a dusty western town street
description: The scene takes place on a dusty western main street lined with wooden storefronts, cactus, and barrels. A figure in a white-silver longcoat and cowboy hat stands over a subdued person who has been brought to the ground, a glowing magical lasso looped around them. A second figure stands to the right in a brown duster coat, holding a glowing fireball or magical energy in their hand. A third figure — pinned down and struggling — wears a dark hat and lies in the dirt. The golden-glowing lasso clearly functions as an aether-infused restraint. Cacti frame the left and right sides of the scene, and wooden buildings recede into the hazy dusty background.
foreground: Figure standing over subdued captive with glowing magical lasso; second figure with fireball stands nearby
background: Dusty western town street, wooden storefronts, cactus, barrels, hazy sky
emotion: Authority and restraint — lawkeepers confident, captive helpless in the dirt
